name: DataProvider
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on DataProvider with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
DataProvider + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on DataProvider with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is DataProvider?

DataProvider is likely a reference to a company or service that offers data-related solutions. Data providers collect and offer various types of data, such as business listings, contact information, and more, which can be used for marketing, research, and other purposes.

Why DataProvider + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on DataProvider, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to DataProvider through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on DataProvider.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on DataProvider, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate DataProvider + Synup?

The DataProvider integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the DataProvider integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the DataProvider logo to manage the Synup + DataProvider integration and associated settings.

‍
